name: anthropic
context: Anthropic Claude API — messages, tool use, streaming, prompt caching, batch processing, and agent SDK
info: Anthropic provides the Claude family of large language models through a REST API at https://api.anthropic.com. The Messages API is the primary interface for sending prompts and receiving completions. Claude supports multi-turn conversations, vision (images and PDFs), tool use (function calling), streaming via server-sent events, prompt caching for cost and latency optimization, and batch processing for high-volume async workloads at 50% discount. The ecosystem covers authentication via API keys, rate limiting across usage tiers, model selection (Opus, Sonnet, Haiku), and the Claude Agent SDK for building autonomous agents. All current models share a unified API surface — choose your model ID and the rest works identically.
body:
# Anthropic Claude API

The Anthropic API gives programmatic access to Claude, a family of frontier large language models. The API is RESTful, JSON-based, and available at `https://api.anthropic.com`.

## Core Capabilities

- **[[anthropic/messages]]** — Send prompts, receive completions. Supports multi-turn conversation, vision, and structured output.
- **[[anthropic/messages/stream]]** — Stream responses token-by-token via server-sent events for real-time UIs.
- **[[anthropic/tool-use]]** — Give Claude access to functions it can call. Client-side tools run in your app; server-side tools (web search, code execution) run on Anthropic infrastructure.
- **[[anthropic/prompt-caching]]** — Cache prompt prefixes to cut latency and cost. Cache reads cost 10% of base input price.
- **[[anthropic/batch]]** — Process thousands of requests asynchronously at 50% discount. Results in JSONL within 24 hours.
- **[[anthropic/agent-sdk]]** — Build autonomous agents with the Claude Agent SDK. Define tools, hooks, and multi-agent handoffs.

## Context & Reference

- **[[anthropic/models]]** — Model IDs, context windows, max output tokens, and capabilities.
- **[[anthropic/auth]]** — API keys, required headers, SDK setup for Python and TypeScript.
- **[[anthropic/rate-limits]]** — Usage tiers (1–4), RPM/ITPM/OTPM limits, rate limit headers, and 429 handling.
- **[[anthropic/pricing]]** — Per-model token pricing, cache multipliers, batch discounts, and tool use costs.

## Quick Start

```bash
pip install anthropic
# or
npm install @anthropic-ai/sdk
```

```python
import anthropic

client = anthropic.Anthropic()  # uses ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env var
message = client.messages.create(
    model="claude-sonnet-4-6",
    max_tokens=1024,
    messages=[{"role": "user", "content": "Hello, Claude"}]
)
print(message.content[0].text)
```

```typescript
import Anthropic from "@anthropic-ai/sdk";

const client = new Anthropic(); // uses ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env var
const message = await client.messages.create({
  model: "claude-sonnet-4-6",
  max_tokens: 1024,
  messages: [{ role: "user", content: "Hello, Claude" }]
});
console.log(message.content[0].text);
```

## Environment Variables

| Variable | Purpose |
|----------|----------|
| `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` | API key from console.anthropic.com |

## SDK Packages

| Language | Package |
|----------|----------|
| Python | `anthropic` |
| TypeScript/Node | `@anthropic-ai/sdk` |
| Java | `anthropic-java` |
| Go | `anthropic-go` |
| C# | `Anthropic` |
| PHP | `anthropic-client-php` |

sections.title: What is the Anthropic API
sections.body: The Anthropic API is a RESTful JSON API at `https://api.anthropic.com` for accessing Claude models. All requests require an `x-api-key` header with your API key and an `anthropic-version` header (currently `2023-06-01`). The primary endpoint is `POST /v1/messages` for creating messages. Official SDKs handle authentication, retries, and streaming automatically. See [[anthropic/auth]] for setup.

sections.title: Model families
sections.body: Claude comes in three tiers: **Opus** (most intelligent, best for agents and complex reasoning), **Sonnet** (best speed/intelligence balance), and **Haiku** (fastest, near-frontier intelligence at lowest cost). Current flagship models are `claude-opus-4-6` (1M context, 128k output), `claude-sonnet-4-6` (1M context, 64k output), and `claude-haiku-4-5` (200k context, 64k output). See [[anthropic/models]] for full model details.

sections.title: Official SDKs
sections.body: Anthropic provides official SDKs for Python (`pip install anthropic`), TypeScript/Node (`npm install @anthropic-ai/sdk`), Java, Go, C#, Ruby, and PHP. SDKs handle authentication headers, request formatting, retry logic, streaming, and type safety. The Python and TypeScript SDKs are the most feature-complete. For building autonomous agents, see the [[anthropic/agent-sdk]] which wraps Claude Code.
